prose:
Fukui reactivity indices computed for acrolein using DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fitted) in gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet). Acrolein geometry was provided by the user. Cation and anion radical states (N±1, multiplicity 2) were computed to determine f⁺ and f⁻ indices. Mulliken partial charges from PySCF were used. SCF converged; charge-conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0, sum f⁻ = 1.0). Most electrophilic site: terminal vinyl carbon C-4 (f⁺ = 0.6423). Most nucleophilic site: carbonyl oxygen O-1 (f⁻ = 0.3939). Dual descriptor identifies C-4 as dominant electrophilic site (ΔDD = 0.5549). All values reported at full precision as returned by chemkit.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
